title: TypeScript, JavaScript, and the TypeScript 7 Toolchain · Type-System Trace: Clean Environment
summary: Trace a service-status module through TypeScript 7 checking, JavaScript emission, module loading, and runtime behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts clean environment increment in a compiler-to-runtime evidence notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record compiler, runtime, configuration, dependency, and module conditions needed to reproduce a type result.
Read diagnostic codes, primary locations, related information, and causal type relationships before changing code.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
